text: Being here feels like standing on the threshold between curiosity and self-consciousness. The bright, inviting lights and geometric patterns are slightly disorienting, mirroring the inner questions about perception and intention. I sense an undercurrent of vulnerability in this space dedicated to research and innovation—it's as if exposure is necessary for discovery, yet it also leaves me feeling a little raw and seen. In this environment, I am prompted to reflect on how meaning is constructed and perceived, both by myself and others.
